rationale: Adding Spanish translation requires creating an i18n abstraction and threading useLanguage() through every existing component. The translations, i18n provider, and language toggle are in-scope. Component edits and prompt/date string edits are adjacent — required to consume the abstraction. Anything outside src/ (scoring, e2e suite additions are fine but the e2e harness itself is not, scripts, infra) is unexpected for an i18n feature.
